title: WorldState
description: Ananke world snapshot — the complete state required to resume or replay a simulation. See docs/wire-protocol.md for serialisation rules.

_ananke_version.description: Schema version stamped by stampSnapshot(), e.g. "0.1". Absent on legacy saves.

_schema.description: Schema discrimination tag — always "world" for WorldState snapshots.

tick.description: @core — Current simulation tick. Incremented by stepWorld() each call.

seed.description: @core — Deterministic RNG seed. Same seed + same commands → identical output.

activeFieldEffects.description: @subsystem(capability) — Active suppression zones and field-effect modifiers.

__partyRegistry.description: @subsystem(party) — Global party registry for morale and formation bonuses.

EntityCore.title: Entity (@core fields)
EntityCore.description: Core entity fields required by stepWorld() every tick. Subsystem and host-extension fields are permitted but not listed here — see src/sim/entity.ts.

teamId.description: Team allegiance. Entities on the same teamId do not auto-target each other.

attributes.description: IndividualAttributes — physical and cognitive stats. All Q values are fixed-point integers scaled by SCALE.Q = 10 000.

energy.description: EnergyState — current stamina and metabolic state.
